summary: Verified the new matkaapi.com integration end-to-end (backend) and the Refer page App/Website links + WhatsApp share text (frontend). 11/11 backend pytest cases passed; all required frontend testids and behaviors verified.
action_items: (Minor enhancement, NOT blocking) ReferPage.copyText uses navigator.clipboard.writeText() inside a sync try/catch. Promise rejection (e.g., when the browser denies clipboard write permission) is unhandled and bubbles to React's runtime error overlay. Recommend: navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => toast.success(...)).catch(() => toast.error('कॉपी नहीं हो पाया')). This was reproducible only when clipboard permission was not granted; with permissions it works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_routes.py still imports MATKA_API_BASE / MATKA_API_USERNAME / MATKA_API_PASSWORD on line 15 even though the new fetch logic no longer uses them. Safe to remove the dead imports for cleanliness.

/api/admin/results/auto-fetch-public route accepts the JWT_SECRET in the body. This works but it's worth noting that JWT_SECRET should ideally not be reused as a webhook shared-secret; a dedicated AUTO_FETCH_SECRET env var would be cleaner. Acceptable for current scope.
_matkaapi_post uses verify=False (TLS verification disabled). Acceptable for matkaapi.com (cert chain reportedly flaky) but flag for prod hardening later.
test_credentials: admin@sattamatka.com / Admin@123 (admin login). Created and removed test user phone=9876512341 password=Test@1234 during run.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily registered user phone=9876512341 to access /refer (auth-gated). Cleaned up via Mongo deleteOne after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend matkaapi.com integration is healthy. Auto-fetch loop logs confirm POST https://matkaapi.com/apis/market_api.php returning HTTP 200 with body 'Update Your Ip' (IP-whitelist required) — handled gracefully by code: errors[] is populated, no 500. /api/admin/auto-fetch-debug returns the documented shape with api_url, *_set booleans, domain='matka11.online', auto_fetch_running, raw_responses{gali_all,market_all}, fetch_result. /api/admin/results/auto-fetch-public correctly returns 403 on wrong/missing secret and 200 on correct JWT_SECRET. Refer page testids: refer-apk-link, refer-web-link, copy-apk-link, copy-web-link, share-whatsapp all present and working; WhatsApp share opens wa.me URL containing both matka11.online/matka11.apk and www.matka11.online (URL-encoded).

test_observations.backend_log_evidence: tail of /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log contained 'Auto-result fetch loop started (matkaapi.com domain=matka11.online)' as required.
test_observations.matkaapi_response: matkaapi.com responds HTTP 200 with body 'Update Your Ip' for both gali=all and market=all (preview server IP not whitelisted — expected, per request).
